meaning: n.第八十,八十分之一 num.第八十
examples: Mr. Stevens recently celebrated his eightieth birthday.
All our family came to Grandad's eightieth birthday party.
Today is my grandpa's eightieth birthday.
And profits after tax were a billion dollars, an eightieth of what the company is likely to be worth when shares are traded.
Williams, who celebrated his eightieth birthday in February, has - on top of his five Oscars - won four Golden Globes, seven Baftas and 21 Grammy awards.
